name: insertText
description: Inserts text at a specific character index within a document. Use readDocument with format='json' to determine the correct index.

documentId.description: The document ID — the long string between /d/ and /edit in a Google Docs URL.

index.description: 1-based character index within the document body. Use readDocument with format='json' to inspect indices.

tabId.description: The ID of the specific tab to insert into. If not specified, inserts into the first tab (or legacy document.body for documents without tabs).
